query: I deployed my custom API endpoint yesterday but it's returning 404 when I try to call it. How do I check if it actually got registered on the tenant?
I have several custom API endpoints and I need to see which ones are successfully deployed vs which ones failed registration. Some of them aren't working and I need to understand why.
After deploying my custom SCAPI endpoint, the status shows 'not_registered'. How do I figure out what went wrong with the registration process?

We just pushed a new version of our loyalty points API to production and I need to verify the endpoint is live before the mobile team starts integrating. How do I confirm the registration went through?

I'm getting intermittent 404s on one of our custom endpoints — sometimes it works, sometimes it doesn't. I want to check the current registration state across all our custom APIs to see if something is flaky or partially deployed.

Our CI pipeline deploys custom endpoints and I want to add a post-deploy verification step that checks the registration status and fails the build if any endpoint isn't properly registered. What information can I get about the registration state?
I want to create a new custom REST API endpoint that returns personalized product recommendations. What's the cartridge structure and how do I define the route?
How do I call the standard Shopper Products API from my storefront JavaScript to get product details by ID?
I need to configure OCAPI resource permissions to allow my external system to access order data via the Data API.
I'm writing the server-side handler logic for a custom API endpoint. How do I access the request body and return a JSON response with proper error handling?
